window_summary: This window tracks the recent refinedev/refine release stream across multiple packages including core, rest, mui, devtools, and router integrations, highlighting key fixes and feature additions.

chunks.title: @refinedev/core@5.0.6
chunks.raw_text:

Release notes:
### Patch Changes
-   [#7106](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7106) [`5a79da5cf4ce38bed776dd63a935dd3102b3d4df`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/5a79da5cf4ce38bed776dd63a935dd3102b3d4df) Thanks [@angelodirb](https://github.com/angelodirb)! - fix: memoize queryOptions.select in useList to prevent multiple executions
-   [#7083](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7083) [`3ece8335935ff3e8c27f5883cd2f06ef29c2c746`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/3ece8335935ff3e8c27f5883cd2f06ef29c2c746) Thanks [@a28689604](https://github.com/a28689604)! - fix(core): stabilize autosave debounce and cancel on unmount in useForm
Fixes #7082
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/core@5.0.6, patch changes include memoizing queryOptions.select in useList to prevent multiple executions, and stabilizing autosave debounce and cancel on unmount in useForm, fixing issue #7082.

chunks.title: @refinedev/mui@7.0.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/mui@7.0.1
Tag: @refinedev/mui@7.0.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-12T10:58:36Z; created_at: 2025-11-12T10:58:31Z
Release notes:
### Patch Changes
-   [#7105](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7105) [`fb46cddfb8eb33b2490fc4f05a8bc7caba2b3691`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/fb46cddfb8eb33b2490fc4f05a8bc7caba2b3691) Thanks [@francoa](https://github.com/francoa)! - fix: Prevent DataGrid Pagination reset. #7099
Fixed an issue in useDataGrid in which the sortModel sent in response was constantly receiving a new Object, even though the content of it was not changing
Fixes #7099
-   [#7107](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7107) [`3edacb0832090c5d0cfd36f933cb97a86328ea7c`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/3edacb0832090c5d0cfd36f933cb97a86328ea7c) Thanks [@alicanerdurmaz](https://github.com/alicanerdurmaz)! - fix: update TSDoc links in MUI button components
Fixed Material UI documentation links in button components to point to the correct URL.
-   Updated dependencies \[[`64625bb337a222ef80727862c758cae86371fa4b`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/64625bb337a222ef80727862c758cae86371fa4b)]:
-   @refinedev/react-hook-form@5.0.3
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/mui@7.0.1, patch changes prevent DataGrid pagination reset by fixing sortModel object reference in useDataGrid (fixes #7099), update TSDoc links in MUI button components, and update dependencies to @refinedev/react-hook-form@5.0.3.

chunks.title: @refinedev/core@5.0.8
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/core@5.0.8
Tag: @refinedev/core@5.0.8; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-01-06T10:20:14Z; created_at: 2026-01-06T10:20:12Z
Release notes:
### Patch Changes
-   [#7143](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7143) [`72ed290dd671ce0031737b5cfe638b2998d3a048`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/72ed290dd671ce0031737b5cfe638b2998d3a048) Thanks [@arndom](https://github.com/arndom)! - - Add case sensitive `eq` and `ne` variants
[Resolves #6984](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/issues/6984)
-   [#7124](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7124) [`dbf5ab844bfe87c0c5b23ca080ab2ef9b64bf070`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/dbf5ab844bfe87c0c5b23ca080ab2ef9b64bf070) Thanks [@arndom](https://github.com/arndom)! - - Invalidate queries on logout.
-   Resolves cached error state being there after login from forced logout.
[Resolves #6997](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/issues/6997)
-   [#7163](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7163) [`add2f6f3c16f808d4d13255a120f6785ad21a425`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/add2f6f3c16f808d4d13255a120f6785ad21a425) Thanks [@alicanerdurmaz](https://github.com/alicanerdurmaz)! - fix(core): `useGetToPath` returns `undefined` #7159
Fixed an issue where `useGetToPath` would return `undefined` when a partial resource object was passed. The hook now always looks up the full resource definition from the resources array to ensure all action routes are available.
Additionally, added a warning message when an action route cannot be found for a resource, making it easier to debug routing issues.
Resolves #7159
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/core@5.0.8, patch changes add case-sensitive eq and ne variants (resolves #6984), invalidate queries on logout and resolve cached error state after forced logout (resolves #6997), and fix useGetToPath returning undefined when a partial resource object is passed, with a warning for missing action routes (resolves #7159).

chunks.title: @refinedev/rest@2.1.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/rest@2.1.0
Tag: @refinedev/rest@2.1.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-01-09T10:13:07Z; created_at: 2026-01-09T10:13:05Z
Release notes:
### Minor Changes
-   [#7196](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7196) [`9217c8596b368bca668dbea9493c0076c57f1d31`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/9217c8596b368bca668dbea9493c0076c57f1d31) Thanks [@erenkurnaz](https://github.com/erenkurnaz)! - fix(rest): make `getMany` method optional in data provider
The `getMany` method is no longer provided by default. Previously, a default implementation was included, but it has been removed to make the method truly optional. Users who need the `getMany` functionality must now explicitly define it in their data provider configuration.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/rest@2.1.0, a minor change makes the getMany method optional in the data provider, removing the default implementation so users must explicitly define it if needed.

chunks.title: @refinedev/inferencer@7.0.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/inferencer@7.0.0
Tag: @refinedev/inferencer@7.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-01-19T16:30:53Z; created_at: 2026-01-19T16:30:51Z
Release notes:
### Patch Changes
-   [#7208](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7208) [`367b4681ae7e336d9cc0397e95c9b9d36186a656`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/367b4681ae7e336d9cc0397e95c9b9d36186a656) Thanks [@JuicyBenjamin](https://github.com/JuicyBenjamin)! - feat: upgrade `@mui/x-data-grid` from v7 to v8
Updated the `@mui/x-data-grid` peer dependency from `^7.23.5` to `^8.24.0`.
This is a major version bump as MUI X v8 includes breaking changes that users should be aware of:
-   Minimum TypeScript version is now v5
-   Package structure updated to use Node.js `exports` field
-   Some removed props: `rowPositionsDebounceMs`, `resetPageOnSortFilter`
-   `showToolbar` prop is now required to display the toolbar
The `useDataGrid` hook and all DataGrid-related types remain fully compatible with v8.
Here is the updated version alignment:
| @refinedev/mui | @mui/x-data-grid | @mui/material |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ------------- |
| 6.x.x          | 7.x.x            | 6.x.x         |
| 7.x.x          | 7.x.x            | 6.x.x         |
| 8.x.x          | 8.x.x            | 6.x.x         |
For the full MUI X v8 migration guide, see: <https://mui.com/x/migration/migration-data-grid-v7/>
-   Updated dependencies \[[`adc4c6431252c035caa62acbaf42f79854535548`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/adc4c6431252c035caa62acbaf42f79854535548), [`367b4681ae7e336d9cc0397e95c9b9d36186a656`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/367b4681ae7e336d9cc0397e95c9b9d36186a656)]:
-   @refinedev/mui@8.0.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/inferencer@7.0.0, a patch change upgrades the @mui/x-data-grid peer dependency from v7 to v8, introducing breaking changes such as minimum TypeScript v5, Node.js exports field, removed props, and requiring showToolbar prop; the useDataGrid hook remains compatible, and dependencies are updated to @refinedev/mui@8.0.0.

chunks.title: @refinedev/mui@8.0.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/mui@8.0.0
Tag: @refinedev/mui@8.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-01-19T16:30:56Z; created_at: 2026-01-19T16:30:51Z
Release notes:
### Major Changes
-   [#7208](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7208) [`367b4681ae7e336d9cc0397e95c9b9d36186a656`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/367b4681ae7e336d9cc0397e95c9b9d36186a656) Thanks [@JuicyBenjamin](https://github.com/JuicyBenjamin)! - feat: upgrade `@mui/x-data-grid` from v7 to v8
Updated the `@mui/x-data-grid` peer dependency from `^7.23.5` to `^8.24.0`.
This is a major version bump as MUI X v8 includes breaking changes that users should be aware of:
-   Minimum TypeScript version is now v5
-   Package structure updated to use Node.js `exports` field
-   Some removed props: `rowPositionsDebounceMs`, `resetPageOnSortFilter`
-   `showToolbar` prop is now required to display the toolbar
The `useDataGrid` hook and all DataGrid-related types remain fully compatible with v8.
Here is the updated version alignment:
| @refinedev/mui | @mui/x-data-grid | @mui/material |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ------------- |
| 6.x.x          | 7.x.x            | 6.x.x         |
| 7.x.x          | 7.x.x            | 6.x.x         |
| 8.x.x          | 8.x.x            | 6.x.x         |
For the full MUI X v8 migration guide, see: <https://mui.com/x/migration/migration-data-grid-v7/>
### Patch Changes
-   [#7217](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7217) [`adc4c6431252c035caa62acbaf42f79854535548`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/adc4c6431252c035caa62acbaf42f79854535548) Thanks [@alicanerdurmaz](https://github.com/alicanerdurmaz)! - fix: prevent server-side filter input from dropping characters in `useDataGrid`
When typing in the DataGrid filter panel with server mode, the input could lose
recent characters because the server update resets the filter model mid-typing.
We now debounce the `setFilters` call inside `useDataGrid` and disable the
DataGrid's own debounce to keep the input state stable while still triggering
server queries.
Resolves #7216
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/mui@8.0.0, a major change upgrades @mui/x-data-grid from v7 to v8 with breaking changes including minimum TypeScript v5, Node.js exports field, removed props, and required showToolbar prop; a patch change prevents server-side filter input from dropping characters in useDataGrid by debouncing setFilters and disabling DataGrid's own debounce (resolves #7216).

chunks.title: @refinedev/devtools-shared@2.0.2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/devtools-shared@2.0.2
Tag: @refinedev/devtools-shared@2.0.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-05T13:50:16Z; created_at: 2026-02-05T13:50:12Z
Release notes:
### Patch Changes
-   [#7248](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7248) [`a851672404703243df7ea150d0f918f002d1571d`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/a851672404703243df7ea150d0f918f002d1571d) Thanks [@erenkurnaz](https://github.com/erenkurnaz)! - feat: make devtools publicly accessible without authentication
DevTools no longer requires authentication to use. Removed Ory client integration,
login/logout/onboarding flows, project ID management, and related API endpoints.
Users can now access DevTools directly without signing in.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/devtools-shared@2.0.2, a patch change makes devtools publicly accessible without authentication, removing Ory client integration, login/logout/onboarding flows, project ID management, and related API endpoints.

chunks.title: @refinedev/supabase@6.0.2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/supabase@6.0.2
Tag: @refinedev/supabase@6.0.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-27T12:52:31Z; created_at: 2026-02-27T12:52:29Z
Release notes:
### Patch Changes
-   [#7281](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7281) [`e22740f7a90901bdf0089c41e7ae51678e4793a5`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/e22740f7a90901bdf0089c41e7ae51678e4793a5) Thanks [@jwild2027](https://github.com/jwild2027)! - fix(supabase): handle realtime subscriptions with multiple filters #6360
Supabase Realtime `postgres_changes` subscriptions support a single `filter` string.
When multiple filters are provided, `liveProvider` now uses only the first valid filter
and logs a warning instead of generating an invalid subscription payload.
Resolves #6360
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/supabase@6.0.2, a patch change handles realtime subscriptions with multiple filters by using only the first valid filter and logging a warning, resolving issue #6360.

chunks.title: @refinedev/remix-router@4.0.4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/remix-router@4.0.4
Tag: @refinedev/remix-router@4.0.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-05T12:25:31Z; created_at: 2026-03-05T12:25:29Z
Release notes:
### Patch Changes
-   [#7245](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7245) [`bf3cc65f73a6801a5fd1e42e6162efd2e89406d3`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/bf3cc65f73a6801a5fd1e42e6162efd2e89406d3) Thanks [@harsha-cpp](https://github.com/harsha-cpp)! - fix: correctly parse deeply nested conditional filters from URL with syncWithLocation
Increased `qs.parse` depth from default 5 to 10 to support deeply nested conditional filters (e.g., `or -> and -> {field, operator, value}`). Previously, nested filter properties were incorrectly parsed as bracket notation keys (`[field]`, `[operator]`, `[value]`) after page reload when using `syncWithLocation: true`.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/remix-router@4.0.4, a patch change fixes parsing of deeply nested conditional filters from URL with syncWithLocation by increasing qs.parse depth from 5 to 10.

chunks.title: @refinedev/core@5.0.11
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/core@5.0.11
Tag: @refinedev/core@5.0.11; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-16T16:36:52Z; created_at: 2026-03-16T16:36:47Z
Release notes:
### Patch Changes
-   [#7289](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7289) [`c040475723d8e2980c0b3ba6d8fae35e05525b09`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/c040475723d8e2980c0b3ba6d8fae35e05525b09) Thanks [@RonakRahane](https://github.com/RonakRahane)! - fix: useDeleteButton now passes meta params to useButtonCanAccess
useDeleteButton was not forwarding the `meta` prop to `useButtonCanAccess`, which caused custom access control rules relying on meta to fail for delete buttons.
Fixes #7285
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/core@5.0.11, a patch change fixes useDeleteButton to pass meta params to useButtonCanAccess, resolving issue #7285.

chunks.title: @refinedev/cli@2.16.52
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/cli@2.16.52
Tag: @refinedev/cli@2.16.52; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-16T16:36:55Z; created_at: 2026-03-16T16:36:47Z
Release notes:
### Patch Changes
-   [#7315](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7315) [`b319c8a7a2f11896008f349481b03ddcf9ed2de0`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/b319c8a7a2f11896008f349481b03ddcf9ed2de0) Thanks [@Aaron3312](https://github.com/Aaron3312)! - fix: resolve bin path from cwd to support monorepo workspace hoisting
`resolveBin()` now walks up from `process.cwd()` to find `node_modules/.bin/<name>`, fixing `MODULE_NOT_FOUND` errors when running `refine dev` in npm/bun/yarn workspaces where packages are hoisted to a parent `node_modules`.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/cli@2.16.52, a patch change resolves bin path from cwd to support monorepo workspace hoisting, fixing MODULE_NOT_FOUND errors in npm/bun/yarn workspaces.

chunks.title: @refinedev/mui@8.0.2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/mui@8.0.2
Tag: @refinedev/mui@8.0.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-23T07:45:31Z; created_at: 2026-03-23T07:45:29Z
Release notes:
### Patch Changes
-   [#7345](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7345) [`af721fe26017cbe11ec997574908b40862a51a63`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/af721fe26017cbe11ec997574908b40862a51a63) Thanks [@tysoncung](https://github.com/tysoncung)! - fix(mui): respect custom `startIcon` when `hideText` is true on all button components
When `hideText={true}` is used with a custom `startIcon`, all MUI button components (`ShowButton`, `EditButton`, `DeleteButton`, `CloneButton`, `CreateButton`, `ListButton`, `RefreshButton`, `SaveButton`, `ExportButton`, `ImportButton`) ignored the custom icon and always showed the default one. This also caused two icons to appear at the same time.
Now the custom `startIcon` is used when provided, and the default icon is only used as a fallback.
Resolves #7343
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/mui@8.0.2, a patch change respects custom startIcon when hideText is true on all MUI button components, resolving issue #7343.

chunks.title: @refinedev/core@5.0.12
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: refinedev/refine
Release: @refinedev/core@5.0.12
Tag: @refinedev/core@5.0.12; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-02T16:44:33Z; created_at: 2026-04-02T16:44:31Z
Release notes:
### Patch Changes
-   [#7372](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7372) [`59c6470ca0ecff0588f749ef4530312e7537bfdd`](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/commit/59c6470ca0ecff0588f749ef4530312e7537bfdd) Thanks [@alicanerdurmaz](https://github.com/alicanerdurmaz)! - fix(core): preserve custom `getList` response fields in `useList` and `useTable` results.
We had an edge case where custom fields returned from `getList` were available on `query.data` but dropped from `result`. Now those extra fields are preserved in both `useList` and `useTable`.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the refinedev/refine release @refinedev/core@5.0.12, a patch change preserves custom getList response fields in useList and useTable results.

questions.query_text: In the refinedev/refine releases, which release adds the option to disable RouteChangeHandler?

answer_support.answer_text: adds the option to disable RouteChangeHandler via the disableRouteChangeHandler option

questions.query_text: Across the refinedev/refine releases, how does the change in @refinedev/rest@2.1.0 differ from the change in @refinedev/rest@2.1.1?

options.text: 2.1.0 makes getMany optional, while 2.1.1 adds missing transformError to deleteOne and custom methods.
2.1.0 adds transformError, while 2.1.1 makes getMany optional.

questions.expected_answer: 2.1.0 makes getMany optional, while 2.1.1 adds missing transformError to deleteOne and custom methods.

answer_support.answer_text: makes the getMany method optional in the data provider
adds missing transformError to deleteOne and custom methods

questions.query_text: In the refinedev/refine release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds case-sensitive eq and ne variants, (2) a release that adds the option to disable RouteChangeHandler, (3) a release that preserves custom getList response fields in useList and useTable.

answer_support.answer_text: adds the option to disable RouteChangeHandler
adds case-sensitive eq and ne variants
preserves custom getList response fields in useList and useTable results
